final:
module RefModule(
                  input signed [31:0] inp,
                  input [4:0]         shamt,
                  input               isSrl,
                  output [31:0]       out
                  wire __isSrl_tmp = (isSrl);
                  assign out = __isSrl_tmp ? $signed(inp>>shamt) : (inp>>>shamt);

endmodule
